title: Utilize a Monday Doc Update as an Automation Trigger

posts.author: jbroz (Jeff Broz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Due to the inability to use multiple sub-items, we work around that by using Monday docs. The doc creation AI functionality is awesome, kudos for that! My struggle is that I cannot use a basic document update to trigger an automation. For example. I have a kickoff meeting minutes template, so I want to keep all of my notes confined to the appropriate Monday doc. I am requesting that when I update that doc, it can trigger any type of automation (teams, email, etc).

What are you trying to achieve

A simple automation trigger when a Monday doc is updated.
